forecasts.short: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Rain Showers
forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers after 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 48. West wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecasts.short: Chance Snow Showers then Partly Sunny
forecasts.detailed: A chance of snow showers before 10am. Partly sunny, with a high near 40. Northwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.
